sub_strands.sub_strand: Critical Listening and Complex Oral Presentations
outcomes: Listen critically to extensive academic presentations to distinguish between explicit assertions and implicit assumptions
Deliver formal individual presentations on socio-economic themes using accurate intonation, stress patterns, and non-verbal cues

sub_strands.sub_strand: Literary Genres and Functional Reading
outcomes: Analyze structural elements and stylistic devices across poetry, short stories, and simple plays
Scan complex reference documents and digital materials to extract specific operational data points

sub_strands.sub_strand: Functional Writing and Syntactic Structures
outcomes: Compose formal book reviews, structural minutes of meetings, and multi-paragraph expository essays
Apply complex grammatical structures including conditional clauses, active/passive voice shifts, and modal verbs accurately

sub_strands.sub_strand: Ufahamu wa Kusikiliza na Majadiliano ya Jopo
outcomes: Kusikiliza makala changamano na kuwasilisha uchambuzi wa kina wa hoja kuu
Shiriki katika majadiliano ya jopo na midahalo rasmi ukitumia lugha sanifu na msamiati wa kitaaluma

sub_strands.sub_strand: Uchambuzi wa Fasihi na Maandishi ya Kitaaluma
outcomes: Kusoma na kuchambua vipengele vya fani na maudhui katika riwaya teule na ushairi wa kisasa
Kusoma maandishi ya taarifa kubaini mienendo na ujumbe uliokusudiwa

sub_strands.sub_strand: Uandishi wa Kazi na Muundo wa Lugha
outcomes: Kuandika tawasifu, barua rasmi za kiofisi, na tanzu mbalimbali za insha za hoja
Kutumia ngeli zote, viunganishi, mnyambuliko wa vitendo, na sentensi changamano kwa usahihi

sub_strands.sub_strand: Integers, Rational Numbers, and Real Number System
outcomes: Perform operations involving negative and positive integers on a vertical and horizontal number line
Apply laws of indices to simplify algebraic numbers and numerical expressions containing exponents

sub_strands.sub_strand: Fractions, Decimals, and Percentages Integration
outcomes: Solve real-life arithmetic problems involving compound fractions, recurring decimals, and percentage increases or decreases

sub_strands.sub_strand: Algebraic Expressions and Linear Equations
outcomes: Formulate and simplify linear algebraic expressions by collecting like terms and expanding single brackets
Form the mathematical modeling for and solve single-variable linear equations containing fractional coefficients

sub_strands.sub_strand: Pythagoras' Theorem and Conversions
outcomes: Verify and apply Pythagoras' Theorem to calculate the lengths of missing sides in right-angled triangles
Convert units of speed, area, and density into equivalent international standard configurations (SI units)

sub_strands.sub_strand: Geometrical Constructions
outcomes: Construct perpendicular bisectors of lines, angle bisectors, and specific angles (90, 45, 60, 30) using a ruler and compasses only

sub_strands.sub_strand: Separation of Mixtures and Acids, Bases, Indicators
outcomes: Perform laboratory experiments to separate mixtures using fractional distillation, paper chromatography, and crystallization
Classify everyday household substances as acidic, basic, or neutral using simple commercial and plant-extract indicators

sub_strands.sub_strand: Linear Motion, Force Types, and Heat Transfer
outcomes: Investigate linear uniform motion parameters and determine relationships between speed, distance, and time graphs
Demonstrate pathways of heat transfer via conduction, convection, and radiation using standard experimental apparatus

sub_strands.sub_strand: Microscopy and Cell Structures
outcomes: Identify parts and demonstrate correct operational handling of a light microscope to view prepared biological specimens
Compare structures and physiological differences between generalized plant cells and animal cells

strands.strand: Physical Environment and Africa Map Analysis

sub_strands.sub_strand: Maps and Relief Features of Africa
outcomes: Locate countries, lines of latitude/longitude, and major climatic zones across the African continent using coordinates
Examine the tectonic theories behind the formation of major landforms like the East African Rift Valley

sub_strands.sub_strand: Human Evolution and Constitutional Governance
outcomes: Trace the archaeological evidence of human evolution and early technological stages in East Africa
Explain the historical process of constitution-making in Kenya and outline the core components of the Bill of Rights

sub_strands.sub_strand: Drawing Instruments and Geometrical Shapes
outcomes: Identify, maintain, and use technical drawing instruments to construct accurate plain geometrical configurations
Draw orthographic views of simple solid objects utilizing plane projections

sub_strands.sub_strand: Workshop Safety and Hand Tools
outcomes: Identify potential hazards in a workshop space and demonstrate strict adherence to safety procedures and emergency steps
Classify common engineering materials (metals, plastics, wood) and select appropriate hand tools for basic manipulation tasks

sub_strands.sub_strand: Land Preparation, Minimum Tillage, and Agroforestry
outcomes: Demonstrate appropriate methods of primary and secondary land preparation for crop establishment
Apply conservation agriculture principles including minimum tillage and value-added agroforestry setups

sub_strands.sub_strand: Nutritional Disorders and Food Safety
outcomes: Analyze causes, signs, and preventive measures for common nutritional deficiency disorders (kwashiorkor, marasmus, scurvy)
Apply modern and local food preservation tech blocks to prevent contamination and bacterial pathogens

sub_strands.sub_strand: Drawing, Painting, and Digital Media Production
outcomes: Apply cross-hatching, smudging, and tonal graduation techniques to render forms from observation
Design corporate identities, posters, and advertisements utilizing graphic design computer programs

sub_strands.sub_strand: Western and African Musical Notations and Instrumental Ensembles
outcomes: Read, perform, and transpose musical scores in simple time signatures containing crotchets, quavers, and semiquavers
Dramatize short scripted plays exploring contemporary issues with proper character voice, expressions, and costuming
